sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63829" key="loimopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοιμοποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n63829.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">causing a pestilence</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:6:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
